primary_variables.matched_definition: Genetic perturbation that reduces or eliminates gene function.
evidence: For DUBR RNA knockdown, cells were seeded and allowed to grow overnight. The next day they were transfected with control (Qiagen, USA; 30300019-2), DUBR 1 (Qiagen; custom design, target sequence: 5’- ACGGAGCAAATCGGAA − 3’) or DUBR 2 (Qiagen; custom design, target sequence: 5’- CTGTTAGACTCATCGA − 3’) GapmeR
GapmeR-mediated knockdown was selected over other deletion or genetic mutation methods to ensure that results were dependent on specific depletion of the RNA transcript

For DUBR RNA knockdown, cells were seeded and allowed to grow overnight. The next day they were transfected with control (Qiagen, USA; 30300019-2), DUBR 1 (Qiagen; custom design, target sequence: 5’- ACGGAGCAAATCGGAA − 3’) or DUBR 2 (Qiagen; custom design, target sequence: 5’- CTGTTAGACTCATCGA − 3’) GapmeR
HCT116 cells were treated with control or DUBR 1 GapmeR, and after 48 h, cells were trypsinized and pelleted.

replicate_hints: ATAC-seq sample preparation was performed using the Active Motif ATAC-seq Kit (53150, Active Motif, USA) following provided protocol. DNA-seq libraries were pooled and then sent to the UCSD Institution for Genomic Medicine where the quality of the libraries was examined by Agilent BioAnalyzer, and sequencing was performed on a NovaSeq X Plus 10B platform with the run type of PE100. ATAC-seq data are available on the NCBI Sequence Read Archive associated with the BioProject PRJNA1186227.
RNA-seq was performed in biological triplicate to enable statistical analysis.

evidence: compared against control knockdown HCT116 cells, ATAC-seq results showed global changes
identified differential expression of RNA transcripts between the triplicate samples of control or DUBR 1 GapmeR treated cells.

targets_and_enrichments.ontology_label: Affinity purification coupled with mass spectrometry proteomics

base_candidates_ranked.reason: The experiment uses RAP-MS (affinity purification) with iBAQ quantification via MaxQuant on a QExactive instrument, which is a standard DDA label-free quantification (LFQ) approach.
The experiment uses RAP-MS (affinity purification) with iBAQ quantification via MaxQuant on a QExactive instrument, which is a standard DDA label-free quantification (LFQ) approach.
